#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "Checkout"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="h1" attrs=[]
        "Your cart"
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="ul" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="li" attrs=[]
          "Keyboard x1"
        element ns=html local="li" attrs=[]
          "Monitor x2"
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
        "Total: $799"
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="form" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="input" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="name" value="card"}, {ns=none prefix=- local="placeholder" value="Card number"}]
        element ns=html local="button" attrs=[]
          "Pay now"
      "\n"
